input: historical traffic flow data from multiple cities (source and target domains)
output: future traffic flow predictions for the target city
backbone: Multi-modal Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) + Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN)
loss: not specified (likely mean squared error or similar regression loss)
